comments.body:
> > cmd/skopeo/sync.go:564:3: unknown field 'OptimizeDestinationImageAlreadyExists' in struct literal of type copy.Options
> 
> You also need to do a `go get github.com/containers/image/v5@master` to fetch the latest c/image code.

Sorry, right, I got ahead of myself. I've done, but I'm not sure of the normal relationship between these projects.. Is using `containers/image@master` desirable (even if fixed to the specific commit)? Or should a specific version be used. And a new `containers/image` release created?

Looks like one last `make vendor` should help make CI happy.

```
GO111MODULE=on go mod vendor

GO111MODULE=on go mod verify

all modules verified

tree is dirty, please commit all changes and sync the vendor.conf

 M go.sum

The command "make vendor && ./hack/tree_status.sh && make local-cross && make check" exited with 1.
```
Thanks @vrothberg - Sorry for the slow follow up. I'm on PTO at the moment, and infrequently online (and didn't stay online to see CI fail previously). But now everything looks good.
Do you have scheduled a release already which contains this merge request?
